subject: fix(theme): remove unused themes from Uniwind extraThemes config
body:
metro.config.js registered 10 DaisyUI themes in extraThemes, but only
lemonade and abyss have @variant blocks in global.css. Uniwind tried to
resolve CSS variables for the 8 missing themes (nord, night, corporate,
business, caramellatte, coffee, silk, sunset) and logged an error for
every missing variable on every CSS rule — producing 3000+ error lines
during build.

Also trimmed the matching THEME_NAMES list in generate-theme-colors.mjs.

Tags: config, theme, build, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch

title: remove unused themes from Uniwind extraThemes config
